abort.missing_context: Panel details are missing. Restart the flow.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the panel. Confirm the host is reachable and the panel is online.
error.invalid_auth: Unable to authenticate with the panel. Check the access code, passphrase, and network connectivity.
error.link_required: The panel requires linking. Enter the access code and passphrase again.
error.no_panels_found: No panels were discovered. Confirm the panel is online, then try again or set it up manually.

data.access_code: Access code (used for linking, NOT a PIN)

data_description.access_code: The panel access code used during linking. It is not a PIN.

discover.description: Select a discovered panel and enter the linking credentials. Use rescan if the panel is not listed. If only one panel is found, enter the credentials to continue.
discover.title: Discover panels

data.access_code: Access code (used for linking, NOT a PIN)

link.description: Enter the access code and passphrase to link the panel.
link.title: Link credentials

data_description.access_code: The panel access code used during linking. It is not a PIN.
data_description.host: The panel host name or IP address.

manual.description: Enter the host and linking credentials.
manual.title: Manual connection

data_description.access_code: The panel access code used during linking. It is not a PIN.

relink.description: Enter the access code and passphrase to relink the panel.

user.description: Choose how you want to add the panel. Discover panels searches your network for Elk E27 devices. Manual setup lets you enter a host name or IP address.
user.title: Set up Elk E27 Alarm Panel
